---
title: "San Francisco Chamber of Commerce (SFCC) Marketing Newsletters"
description: "Marketing Performance Analysis & Content Development"
image: ../Project_Thumbnails/SFCC_logo.jpeg
---

## Overview

Worked on multiple email newsletters for SFCC focused on outreach, engagement, and communication. Contributed to both content development and performance analysis.

---

## My Role

- Assisted in newsletter content creation and formatting  
- Supported campaign execution  
- Analyzed engagement metrics (open rate, click-through rate)

---

## Key Contributions

- Helped improve clarity and structure of messaging  
- Identified engagement patterns across campaigns  
- Provided insights for optimizing future newsletters  

---

## Sample Newsletters

- [Newsletter 1](LINK)
- [Newsletter 2](LINK)
- [Newsletter 3](LINK)

---

## Key Takeaways

- Learned how messaging impacts engagement  
- Gained experience working with real stakeholder communications  
- Developed skills in analyzing user interaction data
